description.value: Price 109,665 gp; Slot none; CL 13th; Weight 4 lbs.; Aura strong evocation and transmutation DESCRIPTION This +4 shock trident is carved from fish-bone and its points are shark teeth. The wielder gains a +4 competence bonus on Profession (sailor) and Swim checks as long as it is held in hand. Once per day, the wielder can utter a command word to create one of the following effects: vortex or control weather. If the wielder uses a polymorph or supernatural effect to take the shape of a creature with a natural bite attack, the trident of the storm captain vanishes and the wielder’s bite attack gains a +4 enhancement bonus until the shapechanging effect ends and the trident reappears. The wielder cannot use the trident’s other abilities while shapechanged. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 54,990 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells call lightning, control weather, greater magic fang, vortex
